ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employee, manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the task type (e.g., Task, Leave, Training) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the task type entails */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the task type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the task type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Pending, Closed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status meaning */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the priority level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the priority level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the project manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task type */,
  "task_title" TEXT /* Title of the task */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the task */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the task is assigned */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task status */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task priority */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the task was started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the task is expected to be completed */,
  "estimate_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to complete the task */,
  "spent_time" TEXT /* Actual time spent on the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES task_priorities ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES task_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_task_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_type_id") REFERENCES task_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tasks" (
  "project_task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-task association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the task was added to the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the task was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tasks_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the comment is related to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task the attachment is related to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the attachment */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "attachment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attachment type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the attachment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_attachment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("attachment_type_id") REFERENCES attachment_types ("attachment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_logs" (
  "time_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time log entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who spent the time */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the time was logged */,
  "hours_spent" REAL /* Number of hours spent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the time log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the time log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachment_types" (
  "attachment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the attachment type (e.g., Document, Image) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attachment type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the attachment type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the attachment type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that depends on another task */,
  "dependent_task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task that the task depends on */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the dependency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the dependency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dependencies_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_dependencies_dependent_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_tags" (
  "task_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task-tag association */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the task was tagged */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the task tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_tags_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)
